appointmentLink.title: appointmentLink
appointmentLink.description: Raw Salesforce URL of the canceled appointment record.

appointmentLinkFormatted.title: appointmentLinkFormatted
appointmentLinkFormatted.description: Slack formatted hyperlink for the canceled appointment record. Use this field when displaying the link to the user in Slack. Format is View Appointment as clickable link.

hcpName.title: hcpName
hcpName.description: Name of the authenticated Healthcare Provider. Populated after successful authentication via unique code.

message.title: message
message.description: Result message of the cancellation. Shows success message with appointment number and patient name on success. Shows error reason on failure e.g. already canceled, not authorized, not found.

success.title: success
success.description: 'Boolean flag indicating if cancellation was successful. True means appointment was canceled. False means cancellation failed. Always check this field before showing result to user.
